creator: zhelezov@gmail.com
text:
After upgrading from 14.1-RELEASE to 14.2-RELEASE, I have recompiled graphics/drm-61-kmod in a local poudriere repository as suggested by the release errata. But I continue seeing these errors on boot while loading the GPU firmware.

drm dmesg output:

<6>[drm] amdgpu kernel modesetting enabled.
drmn0: <drmn> on vgapci0
vgapci0: child drmn0 requested pci_enable_io
vgapci0: child drmn0 requested pci_enable_io
